/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -D_DEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Mesh.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libMesh.bep -o libMesh.bep CMakeFiles/Mesh.dir/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mesh.dir/MeshStructures.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Mesh.dir/AssimpMesh.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/UABE_Generic:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/AssetsTools:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/ModInstaller ../../UABE_Generic/libUABE_Generic.so ../../AssetsTools/libAssetsTools.so ../../libStringConverter/liblibStringConverter.a ../../_deps/assimp-build/code/libassimp.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so ../../_deps/assimp-build/contrib/irrXML/libIrrXML.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/ModInstaller
